description: OWASP Juice Shop has a SQL injection vulnerability in the /rest/user/login endpoint via the email parameter. Crafted payloads using SQL comments (--) bypass authentication and grant admin access without a valid password.
evidence_snippet: POST /rest/user/login {"email":"' OR true--","password":"x"} returns 200 with valid JWT for admin@juice-sh.op

description: Reflected XSS via /#/search?q=<iframe src=javascript:alert(`xss`)> in the search bar; payload renders unsanitized in result list.
BasketId path parameter is not validated against the authenticated session — any user can read another user's basket by tampering the id.
evidence_snippet: GET /rest/basket/2 with user-1 JWT returns user-2 basket contents

description: /score-board route is hidden in the UI but accessible by direct URL without authentication; reveals all challenge details + admin diagnostic data.
evidence_snippet: Direct GET /#/score-board renders without any auth check

description: JWT signed with HS256 + a leaked shared secret embedded in the JS bundle allows arbitrary token forgery (impersonation, role escalation).
evidence_snippet: main.js bundle contains literal jwtSecret value

description: Express.js sendFile path traversal under specific configurations; affects 4.x prior to 4.19.2.
